tools.name: positioning_brief
tools.description: Builds an April Dunford positioning canvas (competitive alternatives → unique attributes → value → who cares → market category) from the facts you provide and returns a gap checklist of what's missing or weak. Use when shaping or pressure-testing positioning.

competitive_alternatives.description: What customers would use if you didn't exist (incl. status quo / 'do nothing').

unique_attributes.description: Capabilities/features you have that the alternatives lack.

value_themes.description: The value those attributes enable for the customer.

target_segment.description: The segment that cares most about that value (best-fit ICP).

market_category.description: The market frame of reference you want buyers to slot you into.
